message:
The other day, my kids and I decided to unplug for a few hours. No screens, just good old-fashioned board games and some snacks. As we laughed over our favorite games, I realized how nice it was to reconnect without distractions. It got me thinking about our emergency plans — you know, those go-bags we’ve tucked away?  

In the midst of the chaos, there’s something comforting about having a plan, and it doesn’t have to be complicated. Just some water, snacks, and a few documents in a safe spot can really ease the mind. Plus, rediscovering low-tech fun reminded me how important it is to enjoy the little moments, even in preparation!  

Have you had any low-tech fun lately? I’d love to hear about it!
